Name: Two Sum
Notes: Classic hash map problem. Store complement as key, index as value. One pass solution.

Name: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock
Notes: Track min price so far, update max profit at each step. No need for DP.

Name: Valid Parentheses
Notes: Use stack. Push on open bracket, pop and compare on closing bracket.

Name: Maximum Subarray
Notes: Kadane's algorithm. Reset running sum to 0 when it goes negative.

Name: Climbing Stairs
Notes: Fibonacci pattern. dp[i] = dp[i-1] + dp[i-2]. Optimize to O(1) space.

Name: Merge Intervals
Notes: Sort by start time, then merge overlapping intervals.
